textByHashes.324899439d62d5d32fc6456066a16d1100846836: Please, come no closer! The flames will incinerate you.
textByHashes.370f51792ec291c750337a816d657f4f129b6a22: Please, leave now! Don't listen... I beg you, leave now, and do not return!
textByHashes.544deaf84df5b499545ac71f8acd4255bf8e7d56: No... I will not tell you!
textByHashes.eb49f309926726793d7c552df63daff71232f444: N-no! Please, Bwana, just leave while you still can!
textByHashes.5b3fbed501c9862fca6e78fd58bb5a1cb6ad76d9: I am Ungadulu, shaman of the Kharazi tribe.
textByHashes.438a8a8cd46d0799052b7481ddbcdf4cb1b88aa8: Please, Bwana, don't listen to me! Run, tell my people I am lost...
textByHashes.e0605ae1a74378aa71c104582c8a3ef87728a420: Run, Bwana! Stay away from here!
textByHashes.ab4de9308ee09411f9af752ace291dae33a90f5e: Thank you, Bwana! You have released me from the demon's grasp, but only for a short while! You must seek out the Book of Binding - it's hidden in these caves somewhere!.
textByHashes.337e6b920500731e32b72e17c3a19990268585ec: There are many trials you must pass... but please, you're my only hope of escape!
textByHashes.ff331987e56d613222cac95ff3a137eb7daad3bf: ...What, what happened? Why am I all wet?
textByHashes.3005a1d9ada585ae8c6978ae2d763ae86c995265: Hey! That's no way to treat a shaman.
textByHashes.82fa62259433a27ca6b398636462cbd0e1f35edb: I hope that teaches you to respect your elders!
textByHashes.de7e05e9333b7b2bbe34ebb7513976936ff454d9: Bwana, you've saved me from the demon Nezikchened! How can I ever repay this favour?
textByHashes.731438e370a6731238130e797e56e6da62f1053b: Yommi tree seeds? To grow a new totem? Then Nezikchened's influence has spread further than I thought...
textByHashes.ea889779f5846c09d64f47d6184a88000c39df53: You should know that growing a Yommi tree is no simple task - but I'll help you as much as I can.
textByHashes.f3029bb3ecc1dab25479843a8154c4db31cc6bb5: Here you are, take these with my gratitude. You'll need to soak them in sacred water to germinate them before planting them.
textByHashes.3fefd19eafed36df5d0ef11c1d9f33a0c04745d1: First you will need to soak the seeds in some sacred water. This will help them germinate and begin the growing process.
textByHashes.9e382f29d6b13e827b2e0c487ef40b333cb68393: Next, you'll need to find a patch of fertile soil and plant the seeds.
textByHashes.129871b98fbbbf5952f666c5fb15b0c6538d9ffb: Yommi trees are magical, and grow very quickly. You'll need to water them often with more sacred water - there should be plenty in the spring.
textByHashes.bfe1e67105032275eca5d754ace9418f1fe2dd92: The sacred water comes from a magical spring, the source of which lies deep underground.
textByHashes.030f8edee8d5033b6a4ebbecc3d0bad841b41c75: Legend has it that the water is protected by spirits of long-dead adventurers who went in search of the spring's source. But you don't need to worry about that.
textByHashes.6d8411fd947ba29747ae334cb2ffba9080ac42e7: Now that you have defeated the demon you can come and go as you please. I cast a spell on you which means that you can pass through the flames without harm.
textByHashes.1719b80943e2005219b254dea25752425ece89a9: I will remain here in the protection of the flaming octagram and continue my research into the spirit world. My recent experience has made me something of an authority on the subject!
textByHashes.62ad0c3983aea45f8d51f32e9a18075d80430caf: But do please visit me here if you have any problems with your Yommi tree. I remember carving my first totem... it's no easy feat!
textByHashes.583fe898f2e8d4b4a070671b35f8f26826f7aed8: It's the least I can do!
textByHashes.01a0936f9752c51049ea5488ebe90a254290e6e7: Hello, Bwana! How is your Yommi tree doing?
textByHashes.3ab7b54742d400f1176d2cd04188870a30526842: Well, if it's sacred water you want, you'd do well to have a look around here.
textByHashes.0c5495257fb3fc4e3503792c24b9a10b877d1e9d: Long ago, the elders blocked off the entrance to the Viyeldi caves, somewhere in this same cave system. There's bound to be evidence of the entrance somewhere.
textByHashes.ffc3099e397d9bd6527e3031822b71176e189d69: Beware though - the caves are deeply cursed, and should you fall, your spirit will be trapped within the caves forever, sworn to protect their secret.
textByHashes.1d11e4062bf45ec6caac2afb363fcef1b27d96ec: Many people have tried, and failed, to find it. My great-grandfather told me he once even saw an expedition of dwarves down there!
textByHashes.390c2265334ac94e158ed182133bfdea52d1c070: Something terrible must have happened to them, because they never returned.
textByHashes.14f32206e9a33860a8a3e36806ce8ef12a748c3b: They say the spirits of those poor adventurers linger still, cursed to protect the water even in undeath...forever...
textByHashes.70677a4cf07f40c6644905a335df2fc0eef82563: You already have some Yommi tree seeds. Use those first and then come back to me if you need any more.
textByHashes.e4cd3765a14fb05776addd362894d0b35736a386: Take better care of these, please. They're very rare.
textByHashes.c956d5bdc94d295662a88533ea1a17ba06f3c2a2: Hello, Bwana. How goes your search for the sacred water?
textByHashes.2776940f7a68a58ea4ab65b83758db0306928ba9: Bwana, I'm afraid this spirit has tricked you! Viyeldi was the spirit of a powerful sorcerer, who controlled the spirits of those bound to the sacred water.
textByHashes.35c406ba2f9c4bd838b896ed3a775c528ef30bf0: If he is truly dead, then those spirits are now free to be controlled by other, far worse forces - that lying spirit is probably one of them.
textByHashes.2e31b809a1daeea3a3fc1cb2020f7e11ee7aa3e5: You did well to come to me, Bwana. As I said before, I am an expert in these matters.
textByHashes.d1aa1bacf30deca16d419f7175026d99d0956709: Spirits are tricky creatures. In most circumstances you should just ignore them - but be especially wary if they ask you for favours. They may be trying to trick you...
textByHashes.ffb909bc04fb6b8187a3187f4468a0b62caedee8: Goodness! That sounds like a fiendish spirit indeed. You're better off banishing it - I have a spell that will do the trick.
textByHashes.1a1b955b11aa5134e725e9ebd8bd33a4e478d131: But I need an item that belongs to the spirit to make it work.
textByHashes.aae4fd4c67f229f169ac9f686985f567bc48b392: If you have something like that, please show it to me.
textByHashes.024121cb16d0c8ba7e36b92487f5e2124269063d: I know some things about them - especially the magical kind. Do you have one of those?
textByHashes.474c4c9a829dbcfd9adfbbb4eb9f1f2b14c469e0: This dagger has been made for one purpose only... thank goodness you brought it to me.
textByHashes.bfad6eec9f7e2c5d25d4ca95516f38fd7a68f6f1: Now we can turn the tables! I can make you a spell with this item which will force the spirit to reveal its true self. Once activated, you will be able to attack it like any normal creature.
textByHashes.d4cefcc1f40a408fc2213258d5ea5f9acb2161f9: Use this spell on the spirit. It will force it to show its true self and make it vulnerable to attack.
textByHashes.08c1053eb60163b0b1e23698ba4e4b3c681633ec: Blessings upon you Bwana. Did you use the spell I gave you to deal with the spirit? And did you find the sacred water?
textByHashes.a4ad4cd9faaf3ea6ace685718996b1385101e5a7: Nezikchened returned? And you defeated him a second time? You truly are a legend, Bwana.
textByHashes.59a74e5af2d53f1e54007dd5246baeae30ab1f20: Did you find the source of the sacred water, too?
textByHashes.f85ad37292b0bf5584fb7cccb1f85a3b78b93b7f: Well, you should be able to plant the Yommi tree and keep it alive by watering it with the sacred water. After that, you can carve your totem pole!
textByHashes.d8524ea434487f1008983b8f33beeaa8b3405103: Let us hope we've seen the last of Nezikchened... who knows what he might try next?
textByHashes.407d33c474314aaa522991584b24dc15833fd045: Tales of your exploits are told throughout the jungle!
textByHashes.ff397053e0b9dc23137d257f3e2503eb4af1b806: How goes your quest to grow the sacred Yommi tree?
textByHashes.9134e359ebac03b66af125c9ce92a8feb53ee71d: That's great news, Bwana. Once you replace the corrupted one, our people will be able to gather together once more.
textByHashes.e8b2f64978267f029f104970750135cbcd4ea4d2: Simply replace a corrupted totem pole with the one you've made. That should make any nearby spirits think twice about bothering my people!
textByHashes.3912eb11422d36377ea83d13e215b6e6dca09de5: You have done well, Bwana, to have succeeded where so many others have failed. You are a true legend.
textByHashes.63c60b72958a96350487844b4ba22d84b15eee8e: Your Legendary exploits are travelling the whole jungle.
textByHashes.e9986b918fb8d36254b22d7d9110650743ed6dc3: Gujuo has been to see me. He told me that you have been given a sacred totem pole. It was constructed by one of my ancestors many moons ago. It is a noble prize Bwana, you have earned it. Look after it well.
textByHashes.35260cfead3c8668b2dd1bc9fe2c511ff0c9593e: Vile serpent, thou wilt pay for that!
textByHashes.70835a4cb10aeb2a415d907dbc1f5a890482067a: Ha ha ha ha! Die, Vacu!
textByHashes.9383bd122b221601cd045fb80a86713be134c358: Foolish Vacu... now thou shalt be my pawn...
textByHashes.1784f2e9d783b3af2bd556d3e9ae9393ee3cc6e2: Iles Resti Yam Darkus Spiritus Possesi Yanai...
textByHashes.2bf43674b59a49eb15c5118051e3765c490b2caf: Curse you... foul intruder... wretched Vacu! Thy meddling ways hath brought thee to thy doom!
